title: AssembleDiffInput
description: Inputs to assemble_diff: base/head/diff_text/changed_files (the diff source) + optional commit_message (its rebar-ticket trailer drives the scope-intent overlay).

commit_message.description: The change's commit message; its rebar-ticket: trailer(s) name the tickets whose union scope/AC the scope-intent overlay reviews the diff against. Default "" (overlay inert).
